_description: Pre-expansion row-count snapshot. Phase 1 (2026-05-13) added 5 lab-range tables (lab_reference_ranges, clinical_thresholds, critical_values, reference_ranges_pediatric, reference_ranges_pregnancy) via curated_lab_ranges source.
_drug_ingredients_note: Baseline was 185; revised to 180 to tolerate DailyMed variance from rxnorm rxcui churn between rebuilds. drug_ingredients counts depend on which rxcuis are in rxnorm_lookup, not strictly increasing.
